Workspace.title: Workspace
Workspace.description: Represents a presentation workspace containing slides

id.description: The unique ID of the workspace

name.description: The custom name of the workspace

markdownText.description: The complete raw markdown text for the presentation

ownerId.description: The Firebase Auth user ID of the owner

Slide.title: Slide
Slide.description: Represents an individual slide with markdown content and optional TTS voiceover url

id.description: The slide ID, usually generated sequentially or as slide index

workspaceId.description: The ID of the parent workspace

slideNumber.description: The sequential 1-based order index of the slide

markdownContent.description: The isolated markdown content for this slide

audioUrl.description: Calculated Text to Speech voiceover stream or file URL

/workspaces/{workspaceId}/slides/{slideI.description: Subcollection of split slides inside a workspace
